title: SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Expansion
text: SoundHound AI achieved its strongest quarter on record with $35 million in revenue, marking an increase of over 100% year over year. Full-year 2024 revenue reached $85 million, representing an 85% increase. Q4 metrics include non-GAAP gross margin of 52%, GAAP gross margin of 40% (down year-over-year due to acquisitions), adjusted EBITDA loss of $16.8 million, and cash position of $198 million with no debt. Expense growth included R&D expenses of $20.4 million (+60% YoY), Sales/Marketing of $9.6 million (+114% YoY), and G&A expenses of $16.4 million (+115% YoY). The company unveiled its third business pillar, the voice commerce ecosystem, which is expected to further increase momentum. Strong automotive sector traction continues, with multiple OEMs pursuing proof-of-concept projects. 2025 outlook includes revenue guidance of $157 million to $177 million, with expected quarterly ramps throughout the year.
